title: Copper Wrench
description: Adds a copper wrench, which can be used to rotate blocks
body:
Copper Wrench adds a new tool that can be used to rotate blocks.
It can be crafted with 4 Copper Ingots and has a durability of 30 uses.

![Copper Wrench Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff2d75eb66ea354494e392acff8187eeacca76d7.png)

**_NOTICE: This datapack requires the use of a resourcepack. You can download it from the file section_**
